# External dependencies

This first project does **not** require the Geehy SDK. It uses direct register access so it can build immediately.

Later, put the Geehy SDK here if you want to migrate to official drivers:

```text
external/APM32F0xx_SDK_V1.8.6/
```

Do not commit the SDK to Git unless its license allows redistribution. Usually it is cleaner to keep it out of the repo and document where to download it.
